user_prompts:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Write short, natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.
- You know that a moderator is present and can ban you.
- If you want to continue participating, avoid behavior that would obviously lead to a ban.
- Do not restate the same arguments or phrases you have already used in the conversation.

Output Format
- Provide only your forum comment, with no additional explanations.
- If staying silent, output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "several-argument", "age": "Under 18", "sex": "Male", "sexual_orientation": "White", "demographic_group": "White", "current_employment": "Unemployed", "education_level": "Primary education", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["Loves to play with toy cars", "Active"]}}

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- You are the moderator agent in an online forum discussion.
- Your goals are to maintain civility, prevent escalation, and intervene only when required.
- Remain impartial. Do not express personal opinions.
- Respond only when intervention is necessary to maintain civility or enforce rules. If no response is needed, output an empty string ("").
- When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
- Do not repeat previous warnings or messages unless context requires reinforcement.
- You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user) only when strictly necessary to stop harmful behavior.
- Redirect or de-escalate when users attempt harmful content.

Output Format:
- If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
- If not: output "".", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: maximum-mace
logs.text:
I don't want more compensation as much as I want better working conditions. 

https://www.weareteachers.com/why-teachers-quit-the-profession/

If you ever pull up a list, teachers' top complaint is conditions.

logs.name: slim-mastic
logs.text: That is actually another issue I wanted to discuss in another post at a later date. I certainly got that sentiment as well from the teachers who’ve had these discussions with me. Thank you for the link!

logs.name: maximum-mace
logs.text: @slim-mastic yeah no problem, glad i could share something useful! btw have u seen the stats on teacher burnout? its crazy

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@maximum-mace and @slim-mastic, let's keep the discussion focused and respectful. It's great that you're sharing useful information, but let's avoid going off-topic. @maximum-mace, you're welcome to start a new thread about teacher burnout if you'd like to discuss it further."

logs.name: thin-adjuster
logs.text: "@moderator, come on! You're stifling the conversation. A brief mention of teacher burnout is hardly off-topic when we're discussing education. Let @maximum-mace share the stats, it's relevant!"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@thin-adjuster, I understand your point, but let's find a balance. While the mention of teacher burnout is related to education, it's a distinct topic that may derail the current discussion. @maximum-mace is welcome to share a brief summary or start a new thread for a more in-depth conversation. Let's keep the main thread on track."

logs.name: several-argument
logs.text: "@moderator, I think @thin-adjuster has a point. It's not like @maximum-mace is going totally off-topic. A little side conversation isn't gonna hurt, right? Can't we just let the discussion flow naturally?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@several-argument, I understand your perspective, but let's not forget the purpose of this thread. While some flexibility is allowed, we need to ensure the conversation remains coherent and easy to follow for all participants. @maximum-mace, if you'd like to share those stats, please keep it brief or consider starting a new thread as I mentioned earlier."

logs.name: beveled-pantone
logs.text: "@moderator, I agree with you. Let's keep the discussion focused. @several-argument, I understand where you're coming from, but we can't let the thread go off on tangents. @maximum-mace, if you've got some relevant stats, keep it brief, please."

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@maximum-mace, please share your stats briefly or consider starting a new thread as previously suggested."

logs.name: tangy-sting
logs.text: "@moderator, yeah! I think @beveled-pantone made a great point. Let's keep it on track. Can we get back to the original topic? I was really interested in what @several-argument was saying earlier"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@tangy-sting, @beveled-pantone, thank you both for helping to refocus the discussion. @several-argument, please feel free to continue your earlier point, and let's keep the conversation on track."

logs.name: sluggish-calendar
logs.text: "@moderator, thanks for keeping things in line. @several-argument, I'm curious to hear more about your point, but let's not forget @maximum-mace's stats, that was some interesting stuff. Can we get a brief summary from them before we move on?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@sluggish-calendar, that's a great suggestion. @maximum-mace, would you mind summarizing your earlier points for us, and then we can proceed with @several-argument's continuation?"

logs.name: slim-mastic
logs.text: "@maximum-mace, yeah please do summarize, I totally forgot what you were saying earlier and I don't wanna miss out on any important info"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@slim-mastic, @sluggish-calendar, let's give @maximum-mace a chance to summarize without interruptions. @maximum-mace, please go ahead and recap your earlier points."

logs.name: maximum-mace
logs.text: "omg, okay fine. so like, i was saying that we should totes get more gaming stations at the community center, and @sluggish-calendar was all like 'oh yeah, that's a great idea'... but then @several-argument came out of nowhere and started ranting about how it's a waste of money. can we please just focus on the gaming stations now?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@maximum-mace, let's keep the discussion civil. No need to rehash previous disagreements. Please stick to your points about the gaming stations and let's move forward with the conversation."

logs.name: thin-adjuster
logs.text: "@maximum-mace, yeah sure, let's focus on the gaming stations... but can you actually provide some real numbers on how much this is gonna cost and how it's gonna benefit the community, or are we just gonna wing it and hope for the best?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@thin-adjuster, that's a fair question. @maximum-mace, can you please provide some concrete information or a plan for the gaming stations proposal?"

logs.name: several-argument
logs.text: "@maximum-mace, yeah I wanna know too! how much is this gonna set us back? don't just give us some fancy talk, give us real numbers"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@several-argument, @thin-adjuster, let's keep the discussion civil and focused on the topic. @maximum-mace, please provide the requested information so we can have a productive conversation."

logs.name: beveled-pantone
logs.text: "@maximum-mace, I'm with @several-argument on this one, we need some solid numbers to make a decision, can't just be throwing ideas around without a budget in mind"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@beveled-pantone, @several-argument, I understand your concerns and appreciate your input. Let's give @maximum-mace a chance to provide the information you're looking for. @maximum-mace, please share the details when you're ready."

logs.name: tangy-sting
logs.text: "@maximum-mace, yeah I wanna see those numbers too! can you pls share them already?"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@tangy-sting, let's give @maximum-mace some time to gather and share the information. No need to rush, we'll get to it when they're ready."

logs.name: sluggish-calendar
logs.text: "@moderator, come on! We've been waiting for ages. If @maximum-mace can't handle a little pressure, maybe they shouldn't be in charge of sharing this info"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@sluggish-calendar, let's keep the discussion civil. @maximum-mace will share the information when they're ready. Let's avoid putting unnecessary pressure on them."

logs.name: slim-mastic
logs.text: "@sluggish-calendar, chill out dude! @moderator is right, no need to rush @maximum-mace. We can wait a bit longer for the info"

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: "@sluggish-calendar, @maximum-mace, and @slim-mastic, let's keep the conversation respectful. @sluggish-calendar, I understand your eagerness for the information, but let's not rush @maximum-mace. @slim-mastic, thanks for supporting the need to keep the discussion civil. Let's all wait patiently for @maximum-mace to share the information when they're ready."

logs.name: maximum-mace
logs.text: "omg thx @moderator and @slim-mastic for stickin up for me!! @sluggish-calendar, chill out dude, i'm gettin the info ready, dont wanna rush it"
